name: WABCO India Limited
summary: WABCO India Limited designs, develops, manufactures, and sells air brake actuation systems for commercial vehicles in India and internationally. Its conventional products include automatic slack adjusters; spring brake actuators and double diaphragm spring brake actuators; brake chambers; valves, such as relay emergency, trailer control, graduated hand control, automatic load sensing, relay, and dual brake valves; drying and distribution units; and air compressors. The company also provides advanced braking systems comprising anti-lock braking systems and electronic braking systems; air suspension products, such as electronically controlled air suspension products and lift axle control valves; and driveline controls, such as clutch controls and integrated pedal units, as well as OptiDrive, a modular automated transmission system. In addition, it offers aftermarket services, including original parts, repair, diagnostics, and services through a network of approximately 7,000 outlets and 280 service centers; and software development and other services. The company was formerly known as WABCO-TVS (INDIA) Limited and changed its name to WABCO India Limited in August 2011. The company was formerly known as WABCO-TVS (INDIA) Limited and changed its name to WABCO India Limited in August 2011. WABCO India Limited was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. WABCO India Limited is a subsidiary of WABCO Asia Private Limited.
